# Support

## How to get help

Before opening an issue, please check these resources:

1. **[Documentation](../docs/README.md)** — setup guide, conventions, and everything else, organized by domain and type
2. **[Existing issues](../../issues)** — your problem may already be tracked

## Asking a question

For questions that are not bugs or feature requests, use **[GitHub Discussions](../../discussions)** rather than opening an issue. This keeps the issue tracker focused on actionable items.

## Reporting a bug

Use the **[Bug Report template](../../issues/new/choose)**.

## Security vulnerabilities

See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for responsible disclosure instructions. Do not report security issues in public issues or discussions.
